violations.text: The ceiling and ceiling tiles throughout the establishment were observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Corrective Action - Establishment is to continue to monitor and contain leaks from roof. Establishment is to continue to monitor and ensure no food products come in contact with any leaking water. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025

The back storage area has an accumulation of soil residue, droppings and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2025
